blocks.text:
To: Mary Frank
Cc: Michelle Rose

A quick update on where we are with the {{fact:f:E-2017-001.client}} positioning work, and one thing we need back from you. I have attached the plan we set at kickoff so the workstreams we are running against are in front of you as you read this.

Michelle Rose has been building the first messaging draft off the kickoff conversation, and it is nearly there. Our plan is to get it to you late this week, so you have it in hand before we take the announcement language any further. If that timing is tight on your end, tell me and we will move it.

The one thing that would help now is your read on priorities. If the operations story and the investor story are pulling in different directions, we would rather know before the draft hardens than after. Ten minutes on the phone works if that is easier than writing it out.
